title: High-Speed Chase Ends in Crash After Armed Robbery
summary: A suspect robbed a Lowe's customer at gunpoint in Belmont, leading to a high-speed chase on I-85 and a serious crash.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risks associated with armed robbery and high-speed pursuits, impacting public safety and traffic flow.

title: Warm Weather Expected Through the Weekend
summary: The Charlotte area will experience warm temperatures and dry weather for the next week.
